date_overrides_blocked_nulls.name: date_overrides_blocked_nulls
date_overrides_blocked_nulls.value: (is_blocked = true AND start_time IS NULL AND end_time IS NULL) OR (is_blocked = false AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND start_time < end_time)

schedules_expert_default_idx.name: schedules_expert_default_idx
schedules_expert_default_idx.where: is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
